pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 17, 21; export_result.sh throughout; install_medintux.sh line 207 creates DrTuxTest database with UTF8 charset. Schema contains IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables populated with demo patient data.
setup_task.sh line 17 drops the view if exists; export_result.sh line 31 checks if SHOW CREATE VIEW vue_adresse_parsed exists in DrTuxTest database
setup_task.sh line 18 removes the file if it exists; export_result.sh line 5 defines OUTPUT_PATH with this exact path
export_result.sh line 17: TEST_GUID="TEST_VERIFY_999". This test GUID is injected into the database during script execution and then removed for cleanup.
export_result.sh line 18: TEST_NOM="TESTMAN". Inserted into IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_NomDos column via line 48.
export_result.sh line 19: TEST_PRENOM="Johnny". Inserted into IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_Prenom column via line 48.
export_result.sh line 20: TEST_ADDR="9999 Verification Boulevard". Inserted into fchpat.FchPat_Adresse column via line 51.
export_result.sh line 21: EXPECTED_NUM="9999". This represents the leading digits extracted from the address field "9999 Verification Boulevard" for the num_voie column.
export_result.sh line 22: EXPECTED_VOIE="Verification Boulevard". This represents the street name (non-numeric portion) extracted from the address field for the nom_voie column.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a SQL view named 'vue_adresse_parsed' in the DrTuxTest database. The view joins IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables on patient GUID (FchGnrl_IDDos / FchPat_GUID_Doss). Required columns: guid, nom_complet (uppercase last name + space + first name), adresse_brute (original FchPat_Adresse), num_voie (leading digits from address, e.g., '9999' from '9999 Verification Boulevard'), and nom_voie (street name portion trimmed). Test case: GUID 'TEST_VERIFY_999' with patient 'TESTMAN Johnny' at address '9999 Verification Boulevard' must parse to num_voie='9999' and nom_voie='Verification Boulevard'. Output: first 20 rows exported to /home/ga/Documents/parsed_addresses.csv with headers. All test data is synthetic, injected during task execution for verification purposes.
